applies_when: User asks whether the camping base suits them without sharing date or people info
User leaves a vague comment like worth going or fun or not
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague camping inquiry into usable visit facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for date, number of people, child age if any, and preferred camping style
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed camp style without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我哪天去、几个人、有没有小朋友，以及更想自搭、拎包入住还是只做白天日营，我可以先帮你把营位收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides date and people facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time camping
User sounds unsure whether self-built, ready-made, or day-camp fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple route decision.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most expensive option first
items.safe_transition: 第一次露营先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把日期、人数、预算和更想省心还是更想自己搭理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks whether rain, wind, or heat affects the camp experience
User worries about mud, bugs, or closures
items.response_goal: Answer weather concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be route and schedule differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that date
avoid: Guaranteeing normal camping in all conditions
items.safe_transition: 天气确实会影响露营路线，我们可以先看你那天更适合过夜、日营还是直接改期。
items.handoff_suggestion: If date and route preference are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about toilets, showers, power, or parking
User worries the trip will be too tiring or inconvenient
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real camp setup, not just sold a spot.
do: Ask about arrival mode, children, and expected comfort level
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我大概几点到、是自驾还是打车、有没有小朋友，我可以先帮你看更省力的营位和动线。
items.handoff_suggestion: If arrival mode and comfort needs are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed route or package comparison in public comments
User discusses private family details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
avoid: Posting a long route plan publicly
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把营位说满，你把日期、人数和想玩的方向发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning visitor comments about coming again
User asks what is new this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a revisit decision, not a fresh first-visit pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new activities or easier arrangements
Keep the tone familiar and light
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老客回来看，我们先看这次新增了什么、哪天更适合来，再决定值不值得再跑一趟。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
